name: Tebiki
description: Japanese video-SOP SaaS for frontline workers — auto-translation and API for learning-record syncing.

seo.title: Tebiki — Localization / Translation API
seo.meta_description: Tebiki: Japanese video-SOP SaaS for frontline workers — auto-translation and API for learning-record syncing.

when_to_use: Auto-translated video SOPs for Japanese frontline workers
API for syncing learning records to LMS systems
Multi-language SOP distribution for factory teams
Video manual localization for manufacturing plants
Knowledge base sync API for factory training apps

pros: Auto-translation tuned for video SOPs and training
API sync with LMS and HR systems
Frontline-worker UX on mobile is strong
cons: Very narrow focus on frontline training use case
Mostly Japan-market; English materials are thin
Pricing tied to seats and sales process
review.verdict: Purpose-built for Japanese factory and service training; outside that niche it is not a localization tool you would pick.
review.best_for: Japanese manufacturers and retailers training multilingual frontline staff
review.not_for: Product teams localizing software strings or marketing copy

lock_in.reason: SOP content exportable, API for LRS sync
